care.summary: A small, striking succulent with dark green pointed leaves covered in white raised stripe patterns.
care.light: Bright indirect to medium light; morning direct sun is tolerated
care.water: Water sparingly when soil is fully dry; every 2-3 weeks in summer, monthly in winter
care.soil: Well-draining cactus/succulent mix with coarse sand or pumice
care.humidity: Low; thrives in dry air, avoid misting
care.fertilizer: Dilute cactus fertilizer once in spring and once in summer
common_issues: Root rot from overwatering — the most common killer
tips: Water from the bottom by soaking the pot in a tray
Use a very gritty, fast-draining soil mix
Small terracotta pots are ideal to prevent moisture buildup
Does well on windowsills, desks, and in small terrariums
